title: Geneticists
description: Research and study the inheritance of traits at the molecular, organism or population level. May evaluate or treat patients with genetic disorders.

tasks.text: Supervise or direct the work of other geneticists, biologists, technicians, or biometricians working on genetics research projects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan or conduct basic genomic and biological research related to areas such as regulation of gene expression, protein interactions, metabolic networks, and nucleic acid or protein complexes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare results of experimental findings for presentation at professional conferences or in scientific journals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain laboratory notebooks that record research methods, procedures, and results.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Write grants and papers or attend fundraising events to seek research funds.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Search scientific literature to select and modify methods and procedures most appropriate for genetic research goals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review, approve, or interpret genetic laboratory results.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Attend clinical and research conferences and read scientific literature to keep abreast of technological advances and current genetic research findings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate genetic data by performing appropriate mathematical or statistical calculations and analyses.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze determinants responsible for specific inherited traits, and devise methods for altering traits or producing new traits.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Extract deoxyribonucleic acid (DNA) or perform diagnostic tests involving processes such as gel electrophoresis, Southern blot analysis, and polymerase chain reaction analysis.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with biologists and other professionals to conduct appropriate genetic and biochemical analyses.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Instruct medical students, graduate students, or others in methods or procedures for diagnosis and management of genetic disorders.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Create or use statistical models for the analysis of genetic data.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain laboratory safety programs and train personnel in laboratory safety techniques.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Verify that cytogenetic, molecular genetic, and related equipment and instrumentation is maintained in working condition to ensure accuracy and quality of experimental results.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop protocols to improve existing genetic techniques or to incorporate new diagnostic procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with information technology specialists to develop computer applications for genetic data analysis.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design sampling plans or coordinate the field collection of samples such as tissue specimens.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate, diagnose, or treat genetic diseases.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct family medical studies to evaluate the genetic basis for traits or diseases.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Design and maintain genetics computer databases.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in the development of endangered species breeding programs or species survival plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan curatorial programs for species collections that include acquisition, distribution, maintenance, or regeneration.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
